summary: Aggregate published hotspot raster to district-level CSV for CHAP
description: Loads a published mosquito hotspot collection from the managed store, computes the mean hotspot fraction per administrative district, and exports a CSV. Intended to run after mosquito_hotspot_raster has published a collection. The CSV output has columns: t (period), geometry (district shapeID), hotspot (fraction of hotspot pixels in that district).

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: ID of the published hotspot raster collection to aggregate, e.g. "mosquito_hotspots"

parameters.name: temporal_extent
parameters.description: Time range to load, must match what was published, e.g. ["2018-01-01", "2018-04-01"]

parameters.name: geometries
parameters.description: GeoJSON FeatureCollection of administrative units. Rwanda ADM2 districts are bundled at plugins/data/rwanda_districts.geojson.

parameters.name: district_ids
parameters.description: List of identifiers matching the features in geometries, used as labels in the CSV geometry column.
